caption:
Did you know you can access these Museum of the Future areas for FREE? 

🤍 Metro Link Bridge (Emirates Towers Metro Station)
🤍 Museum Lobby, cafe, souvenir shop
🤍 Level 1 Terrace when you dine at Parker’s pop-up

Tag your fam and besties!

transcription.text: There's something about you that now I can't remember It's the same damn thing that made my heart surrender And I miss you on a train, I miss you
